title: Boilerplate Page
description: A minimal page composed of a single Example Handlebars component row. Use as a starting point for new page definitions.
should_do: Add more components to the components array to build full pages
Add multiple previews to show different layouts or content variants
should_not_do: Reference component IDs that are not in your entries.components paths
